level_signals: 10+ years of experience in FP&A, Growth Finance, or Strategic Finance roles
Trusted advisor to Growth, Product, and Marketing leadership
Partners with CMO and senior GTM and Product leaders

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in FP&A, Growth Finance, or Strategic Finance roles
B.A. or B.S degree in related field
Demonstrated ability to forecast revenue, and model funnel dynamics in complex B2B environments
Proven track record of partnering with senior GTM and Product leaders, and influencing business decisions through financial insight
Strong financial modeling skills and experience with large, multi-variable planning tools
Some SQL skills to independently access and manipulate complex datasets
Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to distill complex concepts into clear, actionable insights
Comfortable operating in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and balancing strategic thinking with hands-on execution

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working at a high-growth technology or financial services company
employer_types_named: high-growth technology or financial services company

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Anaplan, Tableau or other equivalent application experience
Experience in data visualization and dashboarding

scope.surface: Self-serve revenue and Growth organization finance support across all segments, regions, and products
scope.business_model: B2B financial infrastructure platform (payments and revenue growth products)
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer acquisition, activation, conversion, retention, and expansion rates
ROI of growth initiatives and customer acquisition investments
core_responsibilities: Lead strategic finance support for the Growth organization, partnering closely with Growth, Product, Data Science, the CMO, and Product Finance.
Develop a deep understanding of the self-serve funnel (acquisition, activation, conversion, retention, expansion) and provide actionable insights that inform both Product and Growth strategy.
Own forecasting and planning processes for Self-serve revenue across all segments, regions, and products; provide clear visibility into drivers of growth and performance against plan.

Build and maintain robust financial models that connect marketing demand generation, growth investments, product or pricing changes, and external drivers to revenue outcomes, enabling high-quality scenario planning and decision-making.
Assess ROI of growth initiatives and other customer acquisition investments, ensuring capital is deployed effectively to maximize long-term value.
Identify and drive opportunities for process automation, data standardization, and improved data infrastructure in partnership with Data Science to increase reporting accuracy and decision velocity.
Translate complex financial, product, and growth data into clear narratives for executive audiences.

green_flags: Clear scope and ownership area — self-serve revenue for the Growth organization globally
Direct partnership with C-suite (CMO) and senior leadership signals high-visibility role
Preferred qualifications explicitly called out as a bonus, not a requirement — encouraging to apply without all prefs
Role tied to Stripe's core growth engine with explicit revenue ownership
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — work arrangement is entirely unclear
10+ years hard requirement may narrow the candidate pool significantly

The archetype sits at the boundary of BizOps/Strategy & Ops and a pure Finance role; classified as BizOps/Strategy & Ops given the strategic and cross-functional mandate, with secondary archetype noting the FP&A flavor.
